JUDGE BENSON, KBAUER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK COURT ORALLY STATES STATEMENT OF DECISION. PLTF. PRESENT W/COUNSEL RONALD SCHIVO, DEFT JOSEPH PUGLIESE PRESENT W/ COUNSEL LISA GYGAX. DEFT RUDY SALDANA NOT PRESENT AS WELL AS DEFT SHERROUSE WHO CALLED THE COURT EARLIER THAT HE CANNOT MAKE IT AS HE IS IN GUERNEVILLE. COURT RULED AS TO DEFT SHERROUSE, THE COURT ORDERS A DISMISSAL OF THE CASE AGAINST HIM, AS TO DEFTS SALDANA AND PUGLIESE, COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR DEFTS SALDANA AND PUGLIESE AGAINST PLTF. JOHN JACOBS ON THE ISSUE OF POSSESSION. DEFTS TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. DEFTS ENTITLED TO COSTS AS PER COST BILL. EXHIBITS RETAINED AND KEPT IN ROOM 205.
